voice: Todd (ElevenLabs, voice_id: pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB) — Clear, Engaging and Educational
notes: Round 5 — custom recording script (record-survey-demo.mjs), no tour overlay. 3 scenes: survey editor (0-15s raw), share page with link+QR (18-40s raw), presentations page (43-58s raw). Boot cut 3s. Trim: simple ss 3.0 cut, no freeze detection (cursor movement too slow). VO uses 4 clips with adelay. Supersedes LXRHtEqirN0 (r2 Bella voice). Old videos m6fRdEv3Cqg and LXRHtEqirN0 should be deleted from YouTube Studio.

steps.display_text: AhaSlides Surveys let you build a multi-question form once and run it two ways. Here's a Post-Session Feedback survey with a Multiple Choice question and a Rating Scale — add as many questions as you need.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides Surveys let you build a multi-question form once and run it two ways. Here's a Post-Session Feedback survey with a Multiple Choice question and a Rating Scale — add as many questions as you need.

steps.display_text: Mode One — share it as a standalone link or QR code. Copy the link and paste it anywhere: email, Slack, or a meeting invite.
steps.tts_text: Mode One — share it as a standalone link or QR code. Copy the link and paste it anywhere: email, Slack, or a meeting invite.

steps.display_text: The QR code is right here. Download it as a PNG, add it to a slide or handout, and your audience scans it on their phone to open the survey instantly.
steps.tts_text: The QR code is right here. Download it as a PNG, add it to a slide or handout, and your audience scans it on their phone to open the survey instantly.

steps.display_text: Mode Two — add the Survey as a slide in your presentation. When you reach it during a live session, the full survey appears on every participant's device all at once. You collect structured feedback without leaving your session.
steps.tts_text: Mode Two — add the Survey as a slide in your presentation. When you reach it during a live session, the full survey appears on every participant's device all at once. You collect structured feedback without leaving your session.
